mano_cua.result_summary: 所有 Dribbble 示例图片加载失败。页面所有图片位置仅显示浏览器默认破损图片图标（16x16 小方块），图片区域完全空白。涉及 Expedition/Buildings 等所有版块，每张图片旁显示'Image by Kate Hoolahan'文字但图片本身未加载。页面布局和文字正常，图片 URL 指向外部 CDN 资源加载失败。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All Dribbble sample images failed to load. Each image position shows only a tiny broken image icon with empty white space. Page layout and text content display normally. The images likely reference external Dribbble CDN resources that are inaccessible.
